plan.title: Bigger, splashier goal-completed celebrate icon with grow/pulse animation

narratives.Description: Bigger, splashier goal-completed celebrate icon with grow/pulse animation
narratives.Overview:
## Summary

Make the **goal completed** celebration icon bigger and splashier, and add animation: grow large then return to original size when the goal is met, then occasionally replay that pulse while the goal remains met until the user resets or clears the goal / tally.

## Context

- Related: #81 (fiesta / papel picado celebrate icon — shipped in v31/v32)
- Related: #72 (daily goals)

## Desired behavior

1. Bigger + splashier celebrate icon (still readable; layout-safe).
2. On meet — grow-then-shrink pulse.
3. Occasional replay while still met until reset/clear.
4. Stop when no longer met.
5. Respect prefers-reduced-motion (static splashier icon only).

## Out of scope

- Changing goal logic, tally math, or reset/clear semantics beyond animation stop conditions.
- #80 / #84.

items.title: Goal-met celebrate icon is noticeably larger and more festive than the current compact mark, without breaking goals layout on mobile/desktop.
On transition to goal met, icon animates grow → shrink back to resting size.
While goal remains met, animation occasionally replays until user resets/clears goal or tally.
Clearing/resetting goal or tally (so goal is no longer met) stops further celebration animation.
When prefers-reduced-motion: reduce is set, no grow/pulse or occasional replay; static splashier icon only.
No regression to daily goals tally / meet / reset / clear behavior (#72).

references.title: Issue #86: Bigger, splashier goal-completed celebrate icon with grow/pulse animation
